after_hours_flow_summary: After hours handling: Emergency calls trigger immediate transfer attempt. Non-emergency calls are collected and scheduled for follow-up during business hours.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours: Emergency calls are transferred to dispatch. Transfer timeout set to 30 seconds. Non-emergency calls are collected and routed appropriately.
questions_or_unknowns: Business hours not confirmed during onboarding.
Emergency definitions not explicitly confirmed during onboarding.
